case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. TELEGRAPH HILL RESIDENCES, LLC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DARIN FOSTER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TELEGRAPH HILL RESIDENCES, LLC. $3,562.13 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,707.13, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF VERSUS DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,562.13 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT TELEGRAPH HILL RESIDENCES, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-19-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TELEGRAPH HILL RESIDENCES, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-03-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TELEGRAPH HILL RESIDENCE, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDERICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS REPRESENTED BY DARIN FOSTER. DEFENDANT TELEGRAPH HILL RESIDENCES, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
